name: Get transaction v2 returns AUTHORIZATION_REQUESTED status with gateway info

steps.name: Given that checkout host is configured through environment variable
And the checkout NPG environment variables are configured
Given the full NPG authorization flow is executed
When the user retrieves the transaction by id v2
Then the response has status code 200
And the transaction v2 status is AUTHORIZATION_REQUESTED
And the transaction v2 gatewayInfo is NPG

fullName: Checkout eCommerce — NPG payment gateway: Get transaction v2 returns AUTHORIZATION_REQUESTED status with gateway info
